Pro Tip

Ask complex questions in plain English. Talk2DB will generate the SQL for you.

Star on GitHub
AI-POWERED SQL ASSISTANT

Chat with your
Database. Naturally.

Ask questions, generate SQL, visualize results, and build reports — all in one place.

Start AskingExplore Features

How many sales were made last month and what's the total revenue?

SQL
SELECT
  COUNT(*) as total_sales,
  SUM(revenue) as total_revenue
FROM sales
WHERE created_at >= DATE_TRUNC('month',
    CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '1 month');
≍Results
total_salestotal_revenue
1,250$98,420.50
